title: Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat – Driver – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Driver. Candidates Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 04-05-2026, and closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat official website mnssrai.com.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Motilal Nehru Sports School Sonipat to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
